channel.title: ublive on Unkle Bonehead
channel.description: Recent content in ublive on Unkle Bonehead

item.title: The Sound of Freedom?
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In this episode I first try to show off CastGardens Podcasting 2.0 features but failed miserably as I picked Podverse Web to attempt to subscribe to my own RSS feed.

item.title: Dont lose sight of the end goal!
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: I originally posted this back in January of 2023. But I think it still needs to be said so I am reposting this here hoping to ram the message home. Once again.

item.title: I use Ubuntu, btw.
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: I gave Ubuntu 23.04 a good try and I like it.

item.title: Ub Live 3/26/23
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Windows is against a religion? Music, Hive News & more!

item.title: Some Artists I want on Web3 NOW!
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: I ran across a really awesome guitar player that uses Linux. I got to thinking of some artists that are some what, if not completely unknown to a large portion of the world. And I couldnt let a another second go by without bringing them to you.

item.title: Radio Update
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: I blow off some steam and talk about Hive, radio stations and music.

item.title: CastGarden is on Lokinet
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: CastGarden is now on Lokinet! Lokinet is similar to Tor only it works at the network layer and the result is you can use any browser and many desktop apps anonymously.

item.title: Ecency: Making Waves
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: The Hive social media front end Ecency released the best update I’ve seen in the almost 3 yrs I’ve been on it. This is outstanding and I check it in this video.
